mainSection.title: Transform school administration with our solution.
mainSection.subtitle: Centralize your institution's management. With Odyssea, you can manage your different cohorts, student grades, and schedules. All this with integrated instant messaging, video courses, activity tracking, QR code attendance, and much more.

mainSection2.title: No need to use multiple management solutions
mainSection2.subtitle: More than just a solution. Odyssea is the Swiss army knife for managing your institution.

item1.title: Report your presence
item1.content: Students can report their presence in seconds by scanning a QR code, significantly reducing the time required for manual attendance tracking.

item2.title: Simplify schedule management
item2.content: Significantly reduce the time spent on creating and modifying schedules. Fewer human errors thanks to automation and data validation.

item3.title: Real-Time activity tracking
item3.content: Track every activity in real-time. From attendance management and scheduling to instant communication, everything is centralized.

mainSection3.title: Centralisez la gestion de votre établissement

item1.title: Une migration simplifiée et rapide
item1.content: Gagnez du temps en important vos listes d'élèves exportées d'une autre solution pour créer des classes rapidement.

mainSection5.title: Rejoignez la révolution de la gestion scolaire.
